case_title: DEBAH, REDOUANE VS YCMAT, RANDY G. DBA GREENLIGHT AUTOMOTIVE GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,975.70 FILED BY DEBAH, REDOUANE AS TO DEFENDANT YCMAT, RANDY G. DBA GREENLIGHT AUTOMOTIVE GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF DECLARATION FILED. DEFT HAVE NOT BEEN SERVED. REQUEST TO RESET NEW COURT DATE.
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT/ ANSWER FILED BY PLTF. NOTICE TO ANSWER (SC-108) MAILED TO THE OTHER PARTY.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF DEBAH, REDOUANE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S APPEARANCE, JUDGMENT HEREIN HAS BEEN ASSIGNED TO: AFC/AUTOMOTIVE FINANCE CORP, 13085 HAMILTON CROSSING BLVD, SUITE 300, CARMEL, IN 46032, TELEPHONE NO. 317-815-9645. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YCMAT, RANDY G. DBA GREENLIGHT AUTOMOTIVE GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-05-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-20-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT WILL DELIVER VEHICLE REGISTRATION IN PLFT'S NAME TO PLFT PRIOR TO JULY 20, 2007 COURT DATE. PROGRESS REPORT. IF REGISTRATION HAS BEEN TRANSFERRED, BY THEM, PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-20-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-31-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF REGISTRATION HAS BEEN RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF, PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-24-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 BY WHEN DEFENDANT SHALL RESOLVE ALL OUTSTANDING ISSUES WITH DMV SUCH THAT PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED CLEAR TITLE AND REGISTRATION. IF THIS HAS NOT OCCURRED, DEFT TO SHOW CAUSE WHY JUDGMENT
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR COURT ORDER DATED JANUARY 15, 2008. HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RECESSION OF THE SALES CONTRACT AND RETURN OF VEHICLE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEBAH, REDOUANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YCMAT, RANDY G. DBA GREENLIGHT AUTOMOTIVE GROUP $3,975.70 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,055.70, THE SUBJECT CONTRACT IS RESCINDED. PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN THE VEHICLE TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE DATE JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPY OF HEARING DATE ON SC-108A: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT MAILED TO PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDER DATED JANUARY 15, 2008. OF FEB-15-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINITFF WILL RESET IF NECESSARY. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
